response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive tooling experience (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership in open-source and workshops, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, mobile platform expertise, and organizational change leadership required for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack with exposure to mobile (iOS/TV), build systems, and automation
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Limited demonstrated experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) as a focus
No mention of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change initiatives
